"'''The Ice Princess!'''" is a short story that appeared in the [[1988]] [[Marvel Comics]] ''[[Ewoks Annual]]''.

==Plot summary==
When [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]] is bitten by an [[ice-beetle]], she is encased in [[Water/Legends|ice]]. [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] reveals that only the juice of the [[fire plant]], found only on the [[Mountain of Doom]], can save her. Unable to spare any [[Soldier/Legends|warriors]] due to increased [[Dulok/Legends|Dulok]] raids, [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]] agrees to let [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] and [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] find the cure. The pair fly to the mountain by [[Hang-glider/Legends|skin glider]] and scale the peak with [[ice clamp]]s, evading a [[dragon-bird]] attack by escaping into a cave. Wandering within its passages, they stumble upon a table complete with food—a feast for the [[Frost Giant]]s and their [[Frost Giants' king|king]]. The [[King/Legends|king]] nearly freezes the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] to [[Death/Legends|death]], but a guard reveals that the dragon-bird is attacking. Warrick suggests that he and Teebo can deal with it, and the king agrees. Warrick gets the Frost Giants to create a large ice wall, then taunts the dragon-bird to fly near it. He then orders the wall pushed over, and the resulting avalanche incapacitates the bird. The grateful king shows the Ewoks the way to the fire plant, and the Ewoks return to the village with it. There, Logray uses the plant to reverse the [[Prince/Legends|princess's]] predicament.

{{Shortstory-stub}}
